tpt-old-pages: Nooca ugu dambeeya ee {{PLURAL:$1|boggan|bogaggan}} waxaa loo calaamadeeyay turjumaad.
tpt-translation-settings-subtitle: Xogta boggani ma tahay mid deggan oo diyaar u ah tarjumaada bulshada?
tpt-translation-intro: Boggan waa [$1 nooc la turjumay] oo ka mid ah bogga [[$2]], turjumaadduna waa $3% dhammaystiran.
pt-cta-mark-translation: Boggaan waxaa lagu calaamadayn karaa  turjumaadda bulshada. Hagaajinta [$1 dooqyada turjumaadda bogga] si aad u ogaysiiso tifaftirayaasha in ay bilaabi karaan turjumaadda waxa ku jira.
pt-movepage-block-tp-invalid: Cinwaanka bogga tarjumaadda ee "[[:$1]]" waa aan ansax ahayn (ma aad u dheer yahay?).
pt-movepage-block-subpage-invalid: Cinwaanka bog-hoosaadka ee "[[:$1]]" waa aan ansax ahayn (ma aad u dheer yahay?).
